svg.text: HashiCorp RAG Pipeline — Detailed Ingestion Design
Step Functions orchestrates CodeBuild · two parallel tracks · converge at S3 · ingest to Bedrock Knowledge Base
Semantically split · metadata-enriched · GitHub blob URLs · product taxonomy
API Fetch Track (parallel with git clone)
Filters: no PRs · body ≥50 chars · updated ≤365 days
Fails fast on rate-limit · Secrets Manager: github-token
BeautifulSoup HTML→MD · accepted-answer ordering · product_family · URL attribution
SHA-256 content-hash dedup · removes files <100 chars · first-occurrence wins (sorted path order)
Writes .jsonl sidecar per document · metadataAttributes: product · product_family · source_type · s3_uri
post_build phase · --delete removes stale objects · completes CodeBuild phase
KMS encrypted · versioning · 90-day noncurrent expiration · all 7 source_types + .jsonl sidecars
StartIngestionJob → poll (30s intervals) → COMPLETE → embed (Titan Embed V2) → OpenSearch Serverless
1024-token chunks · 20% overlap · hybrid search (vector + BM25) · .jsonl metadata registered
MaxConcurrency: 5 · 10 parallel bedrockagentruntime:retrieve calls · hybrid search · min_score: 0.5
zero results per query = WARNING (non-fatal) · PipelineComplete logs pass/fail count per topic
